layoutDetails.shell: Right-rail vertical timeline navigation (72px rail with dots)
layoutDetails.navPattern: Vertical dots connected by a spine line, tooltips on hover show exhibit room names in Roman numerals
layoutDetails.contentFlow: Main content area with alternating left-right timeline nodes for workspace view, card grids for other views
layoutDetails.scroll: Vertical scroll with snap proximity, cascade stagger on view entry
layoutDetails.hero: Exhibit room header with era tag, serif title, and descriptive paragraph per view
layoutDetails.motion: Slide-up cascade (items stagger from bottom, 60ms delay between children)
layoutDetails.density: Balanced spacing with generous margins between sections
layoutDetails.componentTone: Soft (14px border-radius, warm shadows, cream backgrounds)

interactionProfile.buttonHover: Background deepens to darker warm tone, shadow expands
interactionProfile.buttonClick: TranslateY(1px) inset press with reduced shadow
interactionProfile.cardHover: TranslateY(-3px) lift with expanded warm shadow and border tint
interactionProfile.pageTransition: Slide-up cascade animation (450ms ease) with staggered children
interactionProfile.navItemHover: Timeline dot grows from 14px to 18px with warm glow, tooltip appears
interactionProfile.navItemActive: Dot fills with accent color, 18px with persistent shadow
interactionProfile.inputFocus: Golden underline draws left-to-right via ::after pseudo-element
interactionProfile.toggleSwitch: Smooth 280ms slide with amber indicator (accent color when active)
interactionProfile.tooltips: Cream card with serif text, thin warm border, positioned left of timeline
interactionProfile.loadingState: Three dots pulse in amber sequence (1.2s cycle)
interactionProfile.idleAmbient: None — clean and still like a museum

responsiveness.desktop: 1536px+ with expanded padding and wider timeline rail
responsiveness.tablet: 1024px breakpoint: 2-col kanban, collapsed timeline nodes to single side
responsiveness.mobile: 640px breakpoint: timeline nav hidden, mobile hamburger drawer, single-column grids
